notes: Moved the Creation Wizard into its own Pathmark Online tab beside Home rather than positioning it as a dashboard component.
Reduced the wizard visual treatment to a sleeker header and simple progress line.
Removed large Project/Routine explanation cards from the first step.
Replaced wizard guidance expanders with small information popovers so extra text only appears when requested.
Added more left and right padding to text inputs and guide boxes so text is not tight against borders or accent stripes.
Kept required-text detection so required text fields can activate Next once non-empty.
release: v0.6.18 Creation wizard tab and sleeker UX
release_name: Creation wizard tab and sleeker UX
release_notes: Moves the Creation Wizard into its own Pathmark Online tab beside Home, replaces large dropdown-style wizard guidance with compact information popovers, reduces the first-step visual weight, and improves text/input spacing near borders and accent stripes. The repository package includes only the latest Windows download package.
